title: These are the bright spots in the retail sector, according to foot-traffic data
text: Although second-quarter retail visits were down slightly year-over-year, there are plenty of bright spots across the sector, according to foot traffic data from analytics company Placer.ai.

title: 3 Boring Stocks to Buy as Labor Market Faces a Pivot
text: Although the headline print of the June jobs report was encouraging in that it came in below economists' forecast, it might not be enough for the Federal Reserve, meaning that investors should still consider boring stocks to buy based on the possible labor market impact. Basically, the central bank may start to get serious about inflation.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for July 10th
text: AU, CBFV and DLTR have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on July 10, 2023.

title: Why Dollar Tree Breaking The $1 Barrier Will Reshape Discount Retail
text: Dollar Tree's bold move into higher price points, particularly in food and beverage, stands to disrupt the market and seize market share.
